Good morning everyone. Let's start with the Vodafone update.
Thanks Sarah. The architecture review is complete. We need to send the rationale document to the customer by tomorrow.
I'll review the whitepaper today and get back to Fatos with my recommendations.
Great. Next item - the GSK investigation data. Charlie sent an urgent request.
I've been working on the Q1 pricing proposal. The updated numbers are in the shared drive. We need sign-off from the team before sending to the customer.
Action items: Artur reviews Vodafone doc, Bob gets pricing sign-off, team responds to GSK by EOD. Let's wrap up.

This is from a very long meeting.
